{{Infobox location
| name = Myria village
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] lives in [[Myria village]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1">''House of Blades'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Myria village]] is located inside the realm of [[Overlord Malachi]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4">''House of Blades'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The walls of [[Myria village]] were made of sharpened sticks bound by ropes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7">''House of Blades'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Myria village]] is located a day or two northwest.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Myria village, Simon responded. Indirial repeated the name, thinking out loud. “That’s...a day or two northwest, I think. I can make it.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
